payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. These relationship claims are mutually inconsistent for the same person, so no durable update should be committed without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The name Sara likely refers to the same person, but the new relationship claim directly conflicts with the existing durable memory.

details: Detected a direct conflict between existing and new kinship facts.
Preserved ambiguity and avoided committing the new claim as durable memory.
Did not present the superseded or disputed fact as current truth.

repair_options: Ask whether this is the same Sara or a different person with the same name.
Ask which relationship is correct now and whether the prior memory should be corrected.
If there are two different people named Sara, create separate entities with distinguishing context.
